ogTitle: Desailly vs Devereux Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Desailly and Devereux Creek.
heading: Desailly vs Devereux Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Desailly, Queensland and Devereux Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Desailly has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Devereux Creek (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Desailly or Devereux Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Desailly has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Devereux Creek scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Desailly scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Devereux Creek scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Desailly or Devereux Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Desailly has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
